diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 5727f23..c1557c8 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -364,2 +364,7 @@ Day 371 / Week 53 observations:
 - Remaining base is S2 C (~53.2k), S2 A (~5.7k), and a tiny B remainder. Churn is still mostly C (11,762) and A (6,560).
 - Week 53 adjustment: continue harvest. Remove all S2 credits, keep A tier 1 and C tier 4, cut quotas to A=25k/B=100k/C=300k to reduce usage cost, cut ops to $5k/day with no targeted ops, keep tier-5 capacity, and keep dev/ad spend at $0.
+
+Day 378 / Week 54 observations:
+- Cash rose to $1.64M, but subscribers fell to 43,324 after 16,165 cancellations. Usage dropped to 62.6M/week and acquisition is gone.
+- Remaining base is almost entirely S2 C (~42.1k); A is nearly gone (~571). Harvest should optimize around C revenue and compute cost.
+- Week 54 adjustment: cut quotas again to A=10k/B=50k/C=150k and move capacity to tier 4. Keep C tier 4, A tier 1, no credits, $5k/day ops, and zero dev/ad spend.
